chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2067 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8151/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8152/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.8153/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 10.12.2025 Petitioner Muhammad Akram Sahito present in person >>>>>..<<<<< At the very outset, the petitioner was confronted as to the very maintainability of instant Petition, the petitioner present in person does not press this Petition and submits that in the first instance for redressal of his grievance, he will approach before the appropriate forum as provided under the law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
